_comment: EXAMPLE label file. Copy to '<image>.labels.json' (drop the .example) and edit. One per real capture. This documents the format; the values below are a guess, not ground truth — replace them.
_grid_note: [rows, cols] as they appear in THIS image. Row 1 = top, col 1 = left.
_sealed_note: List ONLY the sealed holes as 1-based [row, col]. Every hole not listed is treated as empty/open. Leave [] if the whole block is empty.
